title: Simply Cheese
description: Part of the okipiak's Stuff datapack. Adds cheese into the game.
body:
### Salutations!

I’m okipiak, an amateur content creator. In this project, I’ve added a new use for milk.

# ⚠️ THIS DATAPACK IS NO LONGER SUPPORTED ⚠️
**I have discontinued work on this project due to time constraints. This datapack is not optimized and lacks an uninstall option, so I strongly recommend not using it.**

However, I am now working on something new this time, it won’t be a datapack but Minecraft mod!

**This datapack is a part of my main project: [okipiak's Stuff](https://modrinth.com/datapack/okipiaks-stuff)**
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
  
  This datapack is translated to 4 languages: Polish, English, LolCat and Interslavic (also known     as Medžuslovjansk). 
  
  Feel free to add this to your server. 

</details>

<details>
  <summary>How does it work?</summary>

  You can now right-click a cauldron with milk to fill it. Cover it with solid block, and wait from 10 to 30 minutes for it to turn into Cheese Cauldron.

![Milk Cauldron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b056c282c61005bd6d1049a941222e8bb2cb0e84.gif)

## After some time...
Right-clicking cheese in a cauldron while holding a shovel will drop more Cheese than simply breaking the cauldron.

![Cheese Cauldron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1f7144c84c2d09c07400d7eff362b56f43f61e5.png)

### Simple as that!
</details>
